a with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 2 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus space 3 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top space d a n space b with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 4 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus space j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top. space J i k a space c with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 2 a with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus space 2 b with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top comma space b e s a r space v e k t o r space c with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top
